title: Multi-Objective Collaborative Optimization Model and Application of the Water-Energy-Food-Carbon Nexus Under Uncertainty: A Case Study of the Heihe Irrigation Area
description: SpeakForWater Episode 5: Multi-Objective Collaborative Optimization Model and Application of the Water-Energy-Food-Carbon Nexus Under Uncertainty: A Case Study of the Heihe Irrigation Area. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
